sglang.title: Rename TokenizerManager to StdOrchestrator
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently the tokenizer manager does a lot of things, much more than tokenization, thus it is renamed.
It is called "std" orchestrator, because we will have a "spmd" one in the next PRs.
Moreover, by doing this refactor, adding SPMD logic would be a bit easier and cleaner.

Modifications

sglang.title: [Docs]Add instruction for manually stopping nsys profiler
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add method of stopping nsys profiler manually in doc. Inspired by @MuYu-zhi from #3511

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Code Formatting with Pre-Commit.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Running Unit Tests.
 Update documentation / docstrings / example tutoria

sglang.title: Hierarchical Caching for SGLang
sglang.author: xiezhq-hermann
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
While RadixTree-based context caching provides significant performance benefits, these gains are not always fully realized. A key bottleneck is the capacity limit of GPU memory. Currently, SGLang stores historical KV caches exclusively in GPU memory; whenever more memory is required for b

vllm.title: [Misc] Deprecate `--dataset` from `benchmark_serving.py`
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: It's been a few releases since we gave the warning that we're going to deprecate this arg for running serving benchmark. This PR cleans it up.

vllm.title: [v1] torchrun compatibility
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
continue of #12071 in v1.
some changes to notice:

we need to disable VLLM_ENABLE_V1_MULTIPROCESSING so that the engine lives in the same process as the LLM class, which is required by RLHF framework https://github.com/volcengine/verl . this also reduces the scheduling non-determinism. (cc @robertgs

vllm.title: [V1][BugFix] Fix engine core client shutdown hangs
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Even though ZMQ context.destroy() is meant to close open sockets before terminating the context, it appears to be necessary to do this explicitly or else it can hang in the context.term() method.
Close zmq sockets explicitly before terminating context, make shutdown of client resource more robust, s

vllm.title: Fix some issues with benchmark data output
vllm.author: huydhn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a follow-up of #13068 to fix:

Handle the inf qps config.  The JSON parser used by the database doesn't like this value.  So, I add a custom InfEncoder to convert this to an inf string.
Passing the parameter --tensor-parallel-size to benchmark_serving.py script so that it can be stored in JS
